title: Oregon cannabis business licenses (raw) + filtered recreational retailer/wholesaler subset (derived)
description: Reference dataset used to seed and validate dispensary/location master data in Wyld Business Analyst portfolio projects. The raw Excel file is kept as an immutable source drop; the derived CSV is a cleaned, deduplicated subset filtered to recreational retailers and/or wholesalers.

source.notes: This is the original Excel file as obtained from your chosen public/source system. Keep it unchanged; any transformations should produce new derived files.
source.license_or_terms: Unknown (treat as external reference data; do not redistribute unless permitted).

dedupe.keep: last by expiration_date (if present), else last seen

derived_schema.name: license_number
derived_schema.description: License number for the location (unique in derived file).

derived_schema.name: business_name
derived_schema.description: Business name as listed in the source export.

derived_schema.name: business_licenses
derived_schema.description: Free-text license description field from the source.

derived_schema.name: license_type
derived_schema.description: License type from the source export.

derived_schema.name: physical_address
derived_schema.description: Physical address if provided in the source.

derived_schema.name: expiration_date
derived_schema.description: Expiration date if provided; may be blank.

derived_schema.name: indoor_canopy_sqft
derived_schema.description: Indoor canopy square feet if provided.

derived_schema.name: outdoor_canopy_sqft
derived_schema.description: Outdoor canopy square feet if provided.

intended_consumers.usage: Seed/validate dispensary master (reference dimension) and join to simulated store_code / accounts.
